title: Keystone Plugin Manifest
description: Manifest at the root of a keystone plugin/policy repo. Filename on disk: keystone-plugin.json.

name.description: The plugin's unique name. Lowercase, kebab-case, ≤64 chars.

tier.description: Authority level in the cascade. Defaults to 'org'. Sensors are team-tier only.

keystone_min.description: Minimum keystone binary version this plugin requires (SemVer).

strict.description: Items this plugin ships and locks against override from lower tiers.

required.description: Items this plugin expects to exist somewhere in the cascade but does not ship itself.

strictSpec.description: Items by kind. `sensors` is only valid on tier: team plugins.
